Description: Description
Precondition: Precondition
Steps: Steps | Expected: Expected Result

Description: Display "Register as Voluntary Contributor" service in service list
Precondition: User is logged into the application
Steps: Navigate to the services list | Expected: The new service "Register as Voluntary Contributor" is visible

Description: Display registration form for eligible users
Precondition: User meets eligibility criteria (Saudi nationality, age 18‑65, inactive contributor, no active GOSI engagement)
Steps: Click on the "Register as Voluntary Contributor" service | Expected: Registration form is displayed

Description: Show popup for ineligible user when service is selected
Precondition: User does not meet eligibility criteria (e.g., age <18)
Steps: Click on the service | Expected: Popup message indicating ineligibility appears

Description: Purpose of registration list filtered by business logic
Precondition: User has previous mandatory engagement with known month count
Steps: Fill engagement details | Expected: Only purposes allowed for the user are shown (e.g., Annuity Eligibility, Annuity Upgrade, Establishment Owner, Freelancer)

Description: Submission date auto-populated based on business logic
Precondition: User is on the engagement details step
Steps: Fill required fields | Expected: Submission date is automatically populated per business rule

Description: Wage selection highlights only eligible wages based on last engagement
Precondition: User has a prior engagement record
Steps: Open wage selection dropdown | Expected: Eligible wages are highlighted / enabled; ineligible wages are disabled

Description: Selecting an ineligible wage shows eligibility reason from backend
Precondition: User selects a wage not permitted for their last engagement
Steps: Choose an ineligible wage | Expected: A reason for ineligibility is displayed

Description: User can update wage for each year, activation in January of next year
Precondition: Current date is before January of next year
Steps: Attempt to update wage for next year | Expected: Update is allowed only when month is January of the target year

Description: Display wage details after selecting a wage
Precondition: User selects a wage
Steps: View the wage details section | Expected: Wage details (amount, description) are displayed

Description: Display health record questions as checkboxes
Precondition: User proceeds to Health Record Details step
Steps: Navigate to step 3 | Expected: List of health questions appears with checkboxes

Description: Selecting "Yes" on any medical item routes transaction to workflow
Precondition: User checks a "Yes" option on a medical question
Steps: Submit health record | Expected: Transaction status is set to "Workflow" (pending doctor review)

Description: No medical selection results in auto‑approve
Precondition: User leaves all health questions unchecked
Steps: Submit health record | Expected: Request is auto‑approved

Description: User must agree to disclaimer to proceed
Precondition: User attempts to proceed without checking the disclaimer
Steps: Click "Next" | Expected: Error message prompts user to accept disclaimer

Description: Freelancer must upload supporting document
Precondition: User type is Freelancer
Steps: Proceed to document upload step | Expected: Upload document field is required; request cannot proceed without upload

Description: No document required when user is not freelancer and no medical "Yes"
Precondition: User type is not Freelancer and no medical "Yes" selected
Steps: Proceed to document step | Expected: Document upload step is skipped

Description: Preview request before submission
Precondition: User completes all previous steps
Steps: Click "Preview" | Expected: Preview screen shows all entered details for review

Description: Successful submission displays confirmation with request ID
Precondition: All data valid and submitted
Steps: Click "Submit" | Expected: Confirmation message with unique Request ID is displayed

Description: Submission failure displays backend error message
Precondition: Backend returns an error (e.g., server issue)
Steps: Click "Submit" | Expected: Error message from backend is shown

Description: Validation: active GOSI engagement blocks registration
Precondition: User has an active mandatory engagement with GOSI
Steps: Attempt to register | Expected: Message: "Person has an active engagement with GOSI, cannot be registered as a VIC."

Description: Validation: age <18 blocks registration
Precondition: User age is below 18
Steps: Attempt to register | Expected: Message: "Person is less than 18 years of age, cannot be registered as a VIC."

Description: Validation: age >65 blocks registration
Precondition: User age exceeds 65
Steps: Attempt to register | Expected: Message: "Person is more than 65 years of age, cannot be registered as a VIC."

Description: Validation: NIC mismatch blocks registration
Precondition: NIC data does not match
Steps: Attempt to register | Expected: Message: "No match found with NIC."

Description: Validation: deceased person cannot be registered
Precondition: NIC indicates person is deceased
Steps: Attempt to register | Expected: Message: "Person is deceased, cannot be added as a VIC."

Description: Validation: government employee cannot register
Precondition: User is a government employee
Steps: Attempt to register | Expected: Message: "Person is a Government employee, cannot be registered as a VIC."

Description: Validation: NIC service unavailable after three attempts
Precondition: Simulate NIC service down three times
Steps: Attempt to register | Expected: Message: "NIC service is down, please try again later."

Description: Annuity Eligibility purpose appears only for contributor <300 months with previous mandatory engagements
Precondition: Contributor has <300 months and prior mandatory engagement
Steps: View purpose list | Expected: "Annuity eligibility" purpose is available

Description: Annuity Upgrade purpose appears for contributor >=300 months
Precondition: Contributor has >=300 months
Steps: View purpose list | Expected: "Annuity upgrade" purpose is available

Description: Establishment Owner purpose appears when user has establishment and no previous engagement
Precondition: User owns an establishment and has no prior engagement
Steps: View purpose list | Expected: "Establishment owner" purpose is available

Description: Freelancer purpose appears when user has no prior engagement and provides freelancer document
Precondition: User is a freelancer with no prior engagement
Steps: View purpose list | Expected: "Freelancer" purpose is available

Description: Latest engagement <=3 months triggers workflow requirement
Precondition: Latest engagement is 2 months ago
Steps: Submit request | Expected: Request is routed to workflow (pending review)

Description: Any "Yes" on medical form routes to doctor workflow
Precondition: User selects "Yes" on a medical question
Steps: Submit health record | Expected: Request goes to doctor workflow

Description: Verify UI messages display correctly in English and Arabic
Precondition: User switches language setting
Steps: View validation / confirmation messages | Expected: Messages appear in the selected language (EN/AR)

Description: Service appears in Arabic as "تسجيل مشترك اختياري"
Precondition: Language set to Arabic
Steps: Locate service in list | Expected: Service name is displayed in Arabic

Description: Registration form is hidden for ineligible users, only popup shown
Precondition: User does not meet eligibility criteria
Steps: Click service | Expected: No form is shown; popup with reason appears
